personal.name: Bhargava Shastry
personal.title: Security Engineer & Researcher
personal.description: Security engineer at the Ethereum Foundation and indie security researcher specializing in smart contract security, fuzzing, and blockchain technology.

experience.title: Security Engineer
experience.description: Conducting security research and development for Ethereum protocol, focusing on smart contract security, consensus mechanisms, and protocol-level vulnerabilities.

experience.title: Independent Security Researcher
experience.description: Conducting independent security research, developing fuzzing tools, and contributing to open-source security projects.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Wrote software and tests for Ittiam's Voice over IP phone software.

education.focus: Static analysis and fuzzing techniques for open source bug detection
Specialized in security of microcontrollers and embedded systems
Undergraduate thesis on digital signal processing and embedded systems
